parsed.production_notes: The video features a human actor, but her lip movements appear slightly unnatural and out of sync, indicating AI dubbing or deepfake technology. The robot character and the floating smartphone interfaces are entirely CGI and digitally composited.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, brown complexion. She has long, dark, wavy hair, wears glasses, and has a nose ring.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a light blue, button-up top with subtle embroidery throughout the video.

characters.appearance: Middle-aged male, average build, light complexion. He has short brown hair.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a checkered button-down shirt.

characters.appearance: White humanoid robot avatar. It has a smooth, metallic face with blue eyes and a glowing blue circular core on its chest.

scenes.setting: Office cafeteria, daytime, modern decor, neutral colors.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A holds the camera in a selfie style, looking directly into the lens. She is positioned in the foreground of a modern office cafeteria. Behind her, a counter is visible with staff working, and other people are walking through the space. The lighting is bright and natural. She maintains a smiling and engaging expression.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is a selfie-style shot of Character A in an office cafeteria. She is talking directly to the camera, introducing her situation. Large text overlays display her speech in the center of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: My colleagues don't know I've been practicing my English, and they were making fun of my accent.
Character A says: Let's see their reaction.
scenes.on_screen_text: My colleagues don't know I've been practicing my English, and they were making fun of my accent. Let's see their reaction. Learna AI

scenes.setting: Office meeting room, daytime, glass walls, neutral colors.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits at a conference table, speaking confidently while gesturing with her hands. Behind her and slightly to the right, Character B leans in with a highly surprised expression on his face. Other colleagues are seated around the table in the blurred background. The room features glass walls and modern overhead lighting.

scenes.visual_description: Character A is in a meeting room, speaking confidently to her colleagues. Character B, sitting behind her, reacts with visible surprise to her improved speaking skills. Text overlays show their dialogue in the center of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I'd like to propose a different approach to this project.
Character B says: What did you say?
Character A says: A different approach.
Character B says: Wow, you sound a lot different.
scenes.on_screen_text: I'd like to propose a different approach to this project. What did you say? A different approach. Wow, you sound a lot different. Learna AI

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is back to holding the camera in a selfie style, still seated in the meeting room. She smiles and speaks directly to the camera. She then raises a smartphone into the frame with her right hand, pointing the screen towards the camera.

scenes.visual_description: Character A turns back to the camera, explaining her secret to learning English. She holds up her smartphone to reveal the app she has been using. Text overlays display her speech.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Remember I was always on my phone after lunch?
Character A says: I wasn't scrolling Instagram, I was practicing English with this.
Character A says: It's called Learna.
Character A says: It's like having an English teacher on your phone.
Character A says: Look, let me show you.
scenes.on_screen_text: Remember I was always on my phone after lunch? I wasn't scrolling Instagram, I was practicing English with this. It's called Learna. It's like having an English teacher on your phone. Look, let me show you. Learna AI

panels.panel_visual_description: Character C, a white humanoid robot, stands on the left side of the frame. On the right side, a large smartphone is vertically oriented. The background is a softly blurred, neutral indoor setting.

scenes.visual_description: A CGI robot introduces the Learna app. A large smartphone screen floats next to the robot, displaying various app interfaces and features. Bold text overlays highlight key benefits and claims.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character C says: Wait. Did you know you can speak English like a native in just one week?
Character C says: It's not magic, it's Learna, the app that corrects you as you speak and teaches you without you even noticing.
Character C says: Let's try it together.
scenes.on_screen_text: Wait. Did you know you can speak English like a native in just 1 WEEK! It's not magic, it's Learna, the app that corrects you as you speak and teaches you without you even noticing. Let's try it together. Learna AI

scenes.setting: Top: Black background. Bottom: Office cafeteria.
scenes.camera: Split-screen. Top: Close-up. Bottom: Medium close-up.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up of Character C's head and shoulders against a solid black background. The robot looks forward.
Character A holds the camera in a selfie style in an office cafeteria. She looks directly at the camera and speaks. People are visible walking in the background.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout shows the robot tutor on the top half and the woman in the cafeteria on the bottom half. They engage in a real-time conversation, with the robot correcting her grammar. Text overlays show their dialogue, and graphic sound waves emanate from the robot.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character C says: Do you speak English?
Character A says: A little bit.
Character C says: Where do you live?
Character A says: I am London.
Character C says: Almost. You should say, I live in London.
Character A says: I always mix that up.
Character C says: That is exactly why I am here to help you speak correctly.
Character A says: But I don't have any money.
Character C says: You don't need money. With Learna, you can practice English for free.
Character C says: It is not like other expensive apps or courses.
Character A says: Are you serious?
Character C says: Absolutely. No tricks, just real conversation practice with your AI tutor.
Character A says: Like, a real tutor?
Character C says: Yes. I correct your grammar, your pronunciation, and help you speak with confidence.
Character A says: Okay. I am going to download Learna right now.
Character C says: Great decision. Let's speak English together.
scenes.on_screen_text: Do you speak English? A little bit. Where do you live? I am London. Almost. You should say, I live in London. I always mix that up. That is exactly why I am here to help you speak correctly. But I don't have any money. You don't need money. With Learna, you can practice English for free. It is not like other expensive apps or courses. Are you serious? Absolutely. No tricks, just real conversation practice with your AI tutor. Like, a real tutor? Yes. I correct your grammar, your pronunciation, and help you speak with confidence. Okay. I am going to download Learna right now. Great decision. Let's speak English together. Learna AI

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up of Character C's head and shoulders is centered against a solid dark blue background.

scenes.visual_description: The final scene is an end card with a solid blue background. The robot's head is in the center, surrounded by text prompting the user to download the app and app store badges.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: Download now and start practicing.
scenes.on_screen_text: DOWNLOAD NOW! START PRACTICING. Learna. Download on the App Store. GET IT ON Google Play
